title: Oxymeris multiplinervis
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Oxymeris multiplinervis to provide accurate information.
taxonomy: Oxymeris multiplinervis is a species of sea snail within the family Raphitomidae. It is a type of marine gastropod mollusk. The classification of Oxymeris multiplinervis includes being a member of the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, and order Neogastropoda. Furthermore, it is also classified as a member of the family Raphitomidae within the superfamily Conoidea. The classification of Oxymeris multiplinervis is an example of its complex and specific categorization within the marine biodiversity.
uses: Unfortunately, I don't have information on the medicinal uses of Oxymeris multiplinervis.
preparations: Unfortunately, I do not have any information on herbal preparations related to Oxymeris multiplinervis.
